description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a compact, tactical design, featuring a dark metallic finish and angular contours. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with visible mechanical details and a short, cylindrical muzzle. The grip is ergonomic and integrated into the lower frame, while the trigger guard is elongated and slightly squared for finger protection. The stock is minimal, resembling a pistol grip rather than a traditional shoulder stock, enhancing maneuverability in close quarters. The overall appearance suggests a semi-automatic action with no visible pump or lever, and the design is optimized for urban tactical use.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a dark metallic finish, ergonomic pistol grip, and short barrel, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, narrow barrel, and the compact, angular body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, receiver details, and the ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, the grip, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the receiver, barrel, and grip, mirroring the left side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated and slightly squared, medium size, with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
